rationale: Educ. Code §25.042 governs school transfer rights for children of Texas Juvenile Justice Department employees. It is unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: A school-age child of an employee of a facility of the Texas Juvenile Justice Department is entitled to attend school in a school district adjacent to the district in which the student resides free of any charge to the student's parents or guardian.
_note: No conflict; rule is unrelated to homestead exemption amounts.
